surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal Python hook fix (bloat marker recorder + Stop gate worktree-awareness). No web/UI/startable surface; no API/store/SSE/message-contract touched (backend-affects-frontend N/A). Verified by 9 new regression tests + the full bloat suites (test_bloat_gate_on_stop, test_bloat_baseline, test_anti_ratchet_check, test_check_file_size_cross_repo — all green) and a clean worktree anti-ratchet self-check.

behaviors.behavior: strip_worktree_prefix is idempotent for ordinary repo-relative paths
strip_worktree_prefix only strips a LEADING .worktrees segment
Stop gate does NOT block a worktree-prefixed baselined file mis-marked as crossing (the bug)
Stop gate does NOT block a worktree-prefixed anti-ratchet within ceiling
Stop gate STILL blocks a genuine ratchet (over ceiling) on a worktree path (no weakening)
Stop gate STILL blocks a genuine new crossing (not baselined) on a worktree path
Recorder classifies a worktree edit of an already-baselined file as anti-ratchet (not crossing)
